column1: # Hotword eval manifest — one utterance per line, TAB-separated:
#   <wav path>  <reference text>  <target hotwords for THIS line, comma-separated>
# Lines starting with # are ignored. wav = 16 kHz mono (run_ab.sh decodes as-is).
# Record your own audio (most representative!), or synthesize with macOS `say`:
#   say -v Meijia   -o t.aiff "贾扬清是一位科学家"; ffmpeg -i t.aiff -ar 16000 -ac 1 wav/zh1.wav
#   say -v Samantha -o t.aiff "I use OpenAI a lot";   ffmpeg -i t.aiff -ar 16000 -ac 1 wav/en1.wav
# Example rows (replace with your own; paths are relative to where you run run_ab.sh):

column2: 我在听李沐讲深度学习
I use OpenAI and Anthropic every day
